title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi, founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara, built a regulated financial exchange for event-based prediction markets despite regulatory opposition and four years without revenue. The company sued the government regulator overseeing it, eventually achieved regulatory approval, and reached a $22 billion valuation with millions of customers.
